_help: Machine config read by every script via --project. The AGENT bootstraps this itself with legacy-crawl-capture/scripts/init_project.py (derives most fields from the URL + login JSP + source tree) and completes the rest — you do not hand-fill it. This template is the shape/default reference. status.md §Project Config mirrors these values for humans. Field docs: SETUP.md §5. Worked example: examples/baa.project.json.
